title: PersonaState
description: The authoritative, mutable, PERSISTENT instance of a persona (a conversation save, or an NPC's living state inside a world). The engine owns this; the LLM proposes deltas which the engine validates and applies. STABILITY: once instantiated, mood/disposition/knowledge/goals persist and only change via validated deltas — until the user saves or starts a new experience. When `embedded` is set, this persona is an NPC = persona-in-world (PLAN.md #4): the world loop delegates its turn to the persona loop.

blueprint_id.description: Id of the immutable persona blueprint it was instantiated from.

mood.description: Current emotional state. valence/arousal in [-1,1]; label is free text.

disposition.description: Stance toward each interlocutor, keyed by their id. Relationship scores drift via deltas.

knowledge.description: Things this persona has learned during the session (a memory ledger; used to stay consistent).

goals.description: Active goals with progress, so the persona pursues an agenda over a long conversation.

embedded.description: Set when this persona lives inside a world as an NPC (persona-in-world).

location.description: Place id where the NPC currently is.
